_comment: FLS Configuration Template - Copy and customize for your research domain
_primary_keywords_help: Papers MUST contain at least min_primary_hits of these
_secondary_keywords_help: Optional terms that increase relevance scoring
_min_primary_hits_help: Minimum primary keywords a paper must match
_arxiv_categories_help: arXiv categories to search. Common: math.CO, math.PR, cs.DM, cs.CC, math.NT, physics.*
_oeis_sequences_help: Integer sequences to search in OEIS, e.g., [[1,3,5,8], [2,4,6,9]]
research_context: Describe your research focus here. This is injected into AI prompts for better relevance assessment.
_unpaywall_email_help: Optional. If set (or via FLS_UNPAYWALL_EMAIL env var), FLS can use Unpaywall for OA PDF discovery via DOI and for title search utilities.
_rag_index_db_help: Local SQLite index for offline RAG queries over your downloaded papers + notes.
_rag_chunking_help: Chunk sizes for local indexing (character-based, with overlap).
_rag_ocr_help: Optional. If enabled and tesseract+pdftoppm are installed, FLS can OCR image-only PDFs for indexing.
_paths_help: Output file paths (relative to working directory)
_auto_world_model_help: Automatically add papers to world model on delta scan
_open_access_only_help: Only download papers with open-access PDFs
_lookback_help: How far back to look on delta scans
_delay_help: Rate limiting delays between API calls
_advanced_help: Advanced options for managing paper queue
